description: It is very helpful forensic and opertional network tool which you can use on daily basis to figer out the health about your network. It costs reasonably money comparing with concurency with the same or similar results.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Briefly describes most important security and network issues, - it has very good options to build up your own customized reports and and analysis, - it is helpful forensic tool, - traffic recorder is very good troubleshooting tool for mainly network but also security purposes
cons: - documentation about methods of ADS can be much better, - documentation about traffic recordercan be also much better expecially about adaptive buffers

description: We had problems with network visibility, flowmon showed us what problems we have in the network, that it is not only servers, applications and switches
author: Mirosław Z.
pros: speed of implementation, transparent panel, software adapted to the size of the company
cons: cannot enable automatic window refresh in the Monitoring Center

author: Armen D.
pros: Stable Platform Frequent Updates and new features Easy to operate Good support Manuals
cons: GUI must be improved with maps or diagrams. SQL model can be moved towards Time Series structrue to optimise search time.

description: Data flow issues and understanding high flows
author: Walther T.
pros: Easy to use and self supporting. Good presentation
cons: More than one interface for different software packages

author: Grzegorz Ś.
pros: Flexibility of GUI and ADS , and of course filters.
cons: Often it is too slow. Especialy when it is opened for the first time or when I want to continue the session on the next day.

description: lower number of ddos attacks on my company
author: Ladislav R.
pros: First it was easy installation, now it is good detection.
cons: Hidden data under whalebone logo. I forgot it everytime

author: Radek E.
pros: ADS gives us a quick overview of the state of the network and alerts us to potential deficiencies and threats.
cons: Relatively complex configuration of net flow resources and architecture deployment in small organizations

author: Ivo H.
pros: Ease of use and complexity. Intuitive dashboard management and simplicity of configuration.
cons: Nothing. The errors in software are continually corrected.

description: Flowmon offers us an interesting view of network traffic and flows, which it can visually present in a quickly understandable version. So far we have had no problem with the program. Implementation in the form of network probe and network traffic replication is easy, functional and does not unnecessarily burden network traffic.
author: Jiri K.
pros: easy to use possibility of a really detailed view trouble-free operation user friendly interface
cons: little bit higher price (but worth of it) price of gold support
